69.reason: Should be && to check leaf node (both children NULL)

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Logical error: should be && (both left and right are NULL) to identify a leaf, not || (which includes internal nodes with one child).
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Logical error: should be && (both left and right are NULL) to identify a leaf, not || (which includes non-leaf nodes with one child).
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Should be && to check leaf node (both children NULL)
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  Logical error: This condition is true when a node has at least one NULL child, not only when both are NULL. Should be `!N->left && !N->right` to correctly identify leaf nodes.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.25 , reason:  Logical error: uses || instead of &&. A leaf node requires both children to be NULL, so the condition should be !N->left && !N->right.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Logical error: condition should be !N->left && !N->right to correctly identify leaf nodes; || incorrectly matches nodes with only one child]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.2 , reason:  [This condition is incorrect for detecting leaf nodes. A leaf node must have BOTH left and right as NULL. This condition triggers for any node missing at least one child, including internal nodes with only one child.]
